narrative: Largest single-day bridge flow of the cycle: custody jumped +30.1% to 724,372 PRL (+167,713 in 24h) and minted WPRL surged +166,507 to 718,477 — the cumulative inbound of the prior week landed in a single session. Volume on-DEX rebounded too: $243.4k across the same six pairs (7.5× yesterday's $32k), nearly all of it through the main WPRL/USDT v3 pool. Price stayed under pressure even with the volume burst — volume-weighted -4.88% to $0.5776 — consistent with sellers exiting size via the bridge. Surplus widened to 0.95% (6,851 PRL) with a ~956 PRL in-flight mint still settling. Network hashrate eased -6.5% to 30.71 EH/s while MinePRL added +4 GPUs to 27 and lifted pool share back to ~0.028%. Code velocity tapered further (5 commits/7d combined as last week's RC5.3x burst rolled off), but pearl-research-labs/pearl shipped its first commit since 2026-05-30 (pool share difficulty handling, PR #161) and added +4 stars to 207.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: Largest single-day inbound of the cycle: custody +167,713 PRL and +166,507 WPRL minted in 24h — verified across two consecutive relay reads (custody and supply consistent). 49 new deposit addresses came online (2,044 → 2,093).
On-DEX volume rebounded 7.5× to $243.4k alongside the bridge inflow — deepening liquidity on the main USDT pool. PRL printed $0.5776 (−4.88%) on the day.
/api/supply (718,476.81 PRL) briefly led totalSupplyGrains (717,520.55 PRL) by ~956 PRL — an in-flight mint settling, consistent with prior high-volume days; clears within the day.
Network hashrate −6.5% to 30.71 EH/s; MinePRL pool added 4 GPUs (27 total), pool share back to ~0.028%.
pearl-research-labs/pearl shipped its first commit since 2026-05-30 — PR #161 adds nbits_override to verify_plain_proof for pool share difficulty.

social.summary: No coordinated chatter despite the 30% TVL jump and the loud on-DEX volume spike — @prlnet and @pearlbridgexyz feeds remained quiet, no incident reports. pearl-research-labs/pearl crossed 207 stars and shipped the first core commit in nine days (pool share difficulty handling).

github.last_commit_msg: ux(RC5.36): hide slow-lane explainer when fast-lane has plenty of room
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
Add nbits_override to verify_plain_proof for pool share difficulty (#161)
